E_LR_SCHEDULE:\\n        return None\\n    total_steps = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None else steps_per_epoch * 10\\n    warmup_steps = max(1, min(32, total_steps // 10))\\n\\n    def lr_lambda(current_step: int) -> float:\\n        if current_step < warmup_steps:\\n            return float(current_step + 1) / float(warmup_steps)\\n        progress = (current_step - warmup_steps) / float(max(1, total_steps - warmup_steps))\\n        return 0.5 * (1.0 + np.cos(np.pi * progress))\\n\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.LambdaLR(optimizer, lr_lambda=lr_lambda)\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Use the fixed-step budget more effectively with warmup+cosine decay keyed to TRAIN_MAX_STEPS, plus a moderately higher base LR for faster early optimization in the short training horizon.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"topk\"]}"}}
